programme.title: Mr. Reliable
programme.desc: AFI-winner Colin Friels stars as small-time crook Wally Mellish in this bizarre, true story where police think Wally has his wife and child as hostages, and he relishes the media circus.

programme.title: Wake In Fright
programme.desc: Down under for an adventure-filled holiday, a young American couple quickly find themselves stranded in the unforgiving Australian outback.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Skippy
programme.desc: The Roos are Jerrys soccer team. Kate is their trainer, Skippy is their mascot, and Lou videos their games for discussion after practice. In mid season, however, Thel and Sonny, the supports of all this activity, are laid low with flu.

programme.title: The Naked Wanderer (2019)
programme.desc: Dumped by his girlfriend and sponsored by media scoundrel Brian King, desolate Jake walks all-but-naked up Western Australia's coast for charity, in the hope his gesture will win back Jasmine, until he meets mesmerising backpacker Valerie.

programme.title: Space / Time
programme.desc: After a deadly accident ends their funding, a team of scientists turns to crime to rebuild their interstellar engine and finish their groundbreaking work.

programme.title: The Reef
programme.desc: A menacing shark stalks the crew of a capsized sailboat on the Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: Erskineville Kings
programme.desc: After a two-year absence, a man returns to Sydney to attend his abusive father's funeral and reunite with his estranged brother.

programme.title: West Of Sunshine
programme.desc: Separated from his family and caught in a cycle of gambling and debt, Jim has less than a day to repay a violent loan shark, while looking after his young son.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Skippy
programme.desc: Jerry, Lou & friend Slug are bullied at the beach by Sam & Josh. Skippy is accused of scratching one of the boys & Gary threatens to have the Roo exterminated. Simon has a plan.

programme.title: The Lighthorsemen
programme.desc: Four men of the Australian Light Horse Regiment are thrust into a cavalry charge when the British campaign in Palestine becomes stalemated in 1917. (Peter Phelps, Nick Waters)

programme.title: The Light Horse Century
programme.desc: A Century after the last great cavalry charge in history, members of the Australian Light Horse Association embark on an epic journey across the Middle East.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: The AIMS team are shocked to discover there is an enormous canine stalking the hallows of Cherokee County, North Carolina. What is the beast?

programme.title: Man-Eating Super Zombie Cats
programme.desc: Explore how an incurable zombie-like pathogen is spreading fast, turning big cats around the world into fearless man killers who are baying for human blood.

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: In the vast brackish maze of mangrove wetlands lies a population of untouched bonefish. The boys journey the tropical West Indies determined to catch these world-class fish.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: R&B singer Keyshia Cole is literally dreaming of a beautiful saltwater aquarium in her home. Luckily for ATM, her social media followers led her to them!

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: Washington State's Fish and Wildlife Police arrest a suspect with a criminal past. Plus, Canadian crabbers are caught illegally harvesting crabs in US waters.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: The AIMS team are shocked to discover there is an enormous canine stalking the hallows of Cherokee County, North Carolina. What is the beast?

programme.title: Man-Eating Super Zombie Cats
programme.desc: Explore how an incurable zombie-like pathogen is spreading fast, turning big cats around the world into fearless man killers who are baying for human blood.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet
programme.desc: Dr Dee examines a large horse for a potentially deadly problem and treats a feisty miniature horse. She also teaches a new pig farmer how to castrate piglets.

programme.title: Little Giants
programme.desc: Bradley and Billy are in Great Karoo, South Africa, searching for a majestic micro-dragon - the armadillo girdled lizard. It has a formidable defence mechanism.

programme.title: Clinically Wild: Alaska
programme.desc: A pair of dogs suffer from porcupine quills; a dog hikes across the Alaskan tundra; Dr. Kesting saves a kitten

programme.title: Clinically Wild: Alaska
programme.desc: A pair of dogs suffer from porcupine quills; a dog hikes across the Alaskan tundra; Dr. Kesting saves a kitten

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: The survival documentary continues as preparations for winter progress, and focus falls on finding food. Heimo seeks caribou meat, while Tyler and Ashley chase big game.

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: Washington State's Wildlife Police arrest a trespassing elk poacher. A father and his daughter are caught illegally harvesting white fish.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.sub-title: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. And, the bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Tia tries to find a dog for a couple living on a farm. But will any of the puppies get along with livestock? Plus, the team rescues a violent stray.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: The Wolfpack launches into Spring with ambitions that will push them in new directions. Gabe and Bam ramp up their efforts to rebuild the ranch by turning burnt trees into lumber while Noah reveals epic plans for Alaska.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The extended Kilcher family struggle through a record-breaking harsh winter. Desperate for food, Atz Lee and Jane venture into the brutal elements in search of food.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Follow the crew as Matt, Bobo, Ranae and Cliff investigate a new lead in Florida, for an upcoming episode.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.sub-title: Is Gen Z Trapped by AI
programme.desc: Young people were told artificial intelligence would make them sharper, faster, more creative - and more employable. But for many, that promise now feels more complicated.

programme.desc: Long-retired and near the end of his life, Sherlock Holmes grapples with an unreliable memory and must rely on his housekeeper's son as he revisits the still-unsolved case that led to his retirement.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: Following an armed takeover of the Iranian embassy in London in April 1980, in which all inside are taken hostage, an emotional standoff ensues for six days as an elite group of highly trained SAS soldiers prepare for a groundbreaking ac...

programme.title: Death At A Funeral
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when a man tries to expose a dark secret regarding a recently deceased patriarch of a dysfunctional British family.

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: Shattered by the bombshell of his wifes infidelity, Colin (Ray Winstone) calls in his motley crew of friends from Londons underbelly to exact revenge on the hapless, kidnapped Loverboy.

programme.title: The Professor And The Madman
programme.desc: While working on the first Oxford English Dictionary, a scholar receives thousands of entries from a doctor with a lengthy vocabulary and dark secrets.

programme.title: Six Minutes To Midnight
programme.desc: UK, Aug. 15, 1939: 17 days before WWII, an English teacher and his camera disappear from a coastal boarding school with 20 German teen girls. Miller gets the job six days later, secretly trying to find out what happened.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: The housekeeper Jane Fairchild has the day off as her employers are going to their neighbor's house to celebrate his engagement. The truth is Jane and the neighbor, Paul, have been having an affair for many years.

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Jack comes to Amsterdam to find his father and, through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.

programme.title: The Almond and The Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Wild Target

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The fate of the U.S. government is at stake as Avery and the Cyber team search for the hacker responsible for the largest breach of highly classified data in history.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: After an innocent bystander is killed when dozens of ATMs suddenly spew money into the street, the Cyber team investigates the bank heist that is orchestrated by a real-life cyber Robin Hood.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: When the Cyber team investigates what appears to be a hack into air traffic control's communication system, a greater threat emerges when a flight vanishes into thin air, drawing the team into the world's first case of cyber-hijacking.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: When residents of New York City cannot reach the police when calling 911, the Cyber team realizes this is an airborne computer virus that is infecting cell phones and must find the hacker responsible.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: Avery and the Cyber team attempt to work with black hat hacker Stella Kaine, to track down the hacker who took identity theft to a new level and digitally 'killed' Avery's ex-husband.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: When a jogger's body is found, the Cyber team use the fitness tracker she was wearing at the time of the murder to retrace her steps for the entire night leading up to her death.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: Cyber's most notorious criminal, Python, returns to kidnap Avery's surrogate daughter, making the team decipher a series of elaborate code-like puzzles in an attempt to save her life.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The team tracks a vigilante who is taking an extreme reaction to objectionable social media posts by killing off the worst offenders. Patricia Arquette and Ted Danson star.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The Cyber team investigates when users of a traffic app are rerouted to remote locations and robbed by masked women. Also, Russell reconnects with Greer Latimore after the team completes business in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The fate of the U.S. government is at stake as Avery and the Cyber team search for the hacker responsible for the largest breach of highly classified data in history.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Brass track down a serial killer, and Willows and Brown investigate a robbery/homicide. Also, the team members take turns training Gribbs, new to the team and fresh out of the police academy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The investigation of the shooting of Holly Gribbs continues, while Grissom and Stokes examine the murder of a Las Vegas mega-winner.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Sidel investigate the kidnapping of the wife of a multimillionaire, while Willows and Brown examine the case of a young girl who was the victim of a hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate when a leg is found severed from a body in a lake. Meanwhile Sara and Nick investigate a fraternity pledging gone terribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick take the case of a young man who is found naked in the desert without an obvious cause of death.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Stokes are called on to identify the skeletal remains of a murdered woman, while Warrick and Sara investigate a shooting by a cop.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a teenager and her sister are the sole survivors of the gruesome murder of four members of one family in a quiet suburban neighborhood, Grissom and his entire team investigate the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A serial killer begins leaving clues to taunt Grissom, and Warrick and Nick clash when they investigate a peculiar car accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the death of a first class passenger on a flight to Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate a bug riddled body found in the desert. Warrick and Catherine look into the theft of some valuable art.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Willows hunt down the Highway I-15 serial killer while the unlikely team of Sidel and Brown are assigned to work on a robbery/murder case together.

programme.desc: When a welfare check on a 65-year-old man reveals he's been brutally killed and robbed, Tulsa Homicide must delve into the secret parts of his life for answers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: A woman's lifeless body is dumped on a lonely mountain pass. Leads are scarce, until a seemingly unrelated murder brings Kenda closer to her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When Pamela Edwards is found shot through the heart, Kenda's first task is to shield her young daughters from the horrendous scene. Soon police close in on her killer, ending with a car and foot chase.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies PIT a freshly stolen Dodge Magnum. A man observed selling drugs hides a stolen gun in a wheel well. A man admits to having a problem when used balloons and a frozen NOS tank are recovered.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man is startled when a runaway motorcyclist crashes into his trailer; a suspect plays dumb when deputies confront him with the truth; officers are disappointed when they run into a repeat lawbreaker.

programme.title: Murder Uncut
programme.desc: When Kemia Hassel rang up 911 whilst cradling her dying husband, police detectives had no idea that they would soon unravel a sinister murder-for-hire plot against the US Army sergeant.

programme.title: Targeted For Murder
programme.desc: In Newport Beach, California, millionaire medical innovator Bill McLaughlin is living a luxurious life until he is shot six times in his own kitchen.

programme.title: Csi On Trial
programme.desc: Reveals the lack of science behind some of the most well-known crime scene investigation tools, and tells the stories of the wrongfully convicted who went to prison for years.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: A woman's lifeless body is dumped on a lonely mountain pass. Leads are scarce, until a seemingly unrelated murder brings Kenda closer to her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In this special episode, we focus on those criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: One of the UK's biggest sex trafficking rings was uncovered in Rochdale in 2012. In a horrific catalogue of abuse, girls as young as 13 were subjected to rape and torture by a gang of nine men.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: Michelle Mockbee goes to work early to get a jumpstart on payroll, but less than an hour later, someone murders her outside the office; the surveillance footage leads detectives to a closet full of dirty secrets that may be worth killing...

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: On July 5, 2011, a couple on their way home from a night of birthday celebrations is shot while getting gas and with the killers long since vanished, detectives must rely on the grainy gas station video.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: Widow Marjorie Nugent was a recluse known to nearly everyone in Carthage. When she vanished in 1997, no one seemed to notice. When police got around to looking for her, the investigation would lead them to a shocking suspect, and a grisl...

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: In 2009, investigators found a local volunteer firefighter, Michael Cobb, beat to death and set on fire in his own house.

programme.title: Murder At My Door
programme.desc: An elderly couple are living an idyllic life in a cosy home until a robbery changes everything and one of them is killed.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: For some people, family is not everything. These deadly women satisfied their blood lust within the family.

programme.title: My Lover, My Killer
programme.desc: When Zatoon Bibi vowed revenge on the former lover who'd spurned her, it became a family affair. Her ex-husband and son became part of a macabre plot to punish music producer Tanveer Iqbal for daring to return to his wife.

programme.title: BTK: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: The terrible legacy of Dennis Rader, better known as the BTK Killer for Bind, Torture, Kill, spanned three decades before he was finally captured and incarcerated. Take an in depth look at the entirety of the murderous carnage he unleashed.

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Two adopted sisters, Elena and Christina Rendell, from Florida are inseparable until the social pressures of high school and intense bullying leads to murder.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: Georgia neighbours Kay and Becky are inseparable, working and raising their kids together. But closeness leads to trouble when scandal and murder rock their town.

programme.title: A Body In The Basement
programme.desc: Philadelphia police officers find four adults locked in a basement dungeon. The investigation leads across four states, resulting in multiple arrests.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: In the 1970's, Anneka Di Lorenzo found fame as a successful model in Penthouse Magazine. However, from that point, her life unravelled with tragic consequences.

programme.title: Devil In The Web
programme.desc: Chrissy and her girlfriend, Bria, are huge YouTube stars. Then Chrissy's old flame - a man - starts a devastating revenge porn campaign.

programme.title: JonBenet: An American Murder Mystery
programme.desc: In 2006, a local academic writing a book on JonBenet gets a series of messages from a man called 'Daxis', who has a dark obsession with the case - but why?

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: A Body In The Basement
programme.desc: Philadelphia police officers find four adults locked in a basement dungeon. The investigation leads across four states, resulting in multiple arrests.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Myrle Miller appears to be a sweet, loving grandmother, but beneath the facade lurks a woman driven by selfishness and greed. Today, even her own daughter, Rebecca, is haunted by the fact that her mom was a black widow in disguise.

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: When a badly burnt body is discovered in a house fire, police are unsure if it was arson or an accident. An investigation reveals the shocking truth.

programme.title: Is O.J. Innocent? The Missing Evidence
programme.desc: A team of investigators re-examine the O.J. Simpson case. They inspect a knife that could be the murder weapon and sit down with Fred Goldman and Tanya Brown to get their personal insights into what they believe happened that day.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires
programme.sub-title: Cross Your Heart and Hope to Die
programme.desc: Sarah is dating a young, handsome pastor but soon discovers her preacher man is hiding unholy secrets on a biblical scale. He is prepared to silence Sarah and her whole family to stop her leaving him.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: After a secret photo shoot in the Angeles National Forest, young model Kim Pandelios is never heard from again. Twelve years later, the truth finally comes to light.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of...
programme.sub-title: The Corpse Who Came To Dinner
programme.desc: A lonely widow in rural Pennsylvania finds an unconventional way to cope with loss, and her small town keeps her unusual secret for over a decade.

programme.title: The Tetris Murders
programme.desc: A Russian family are brutally murdered in a Silicon Valley home, a co-developer of the video game Tetris among them. But the lack of evidence confounds police.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children

programme.title: Devil In The Web
programme.desc: A man uses the internet to call and text female realtors in 20 different states. Wielding their social media against them, he makes them believe he's lurking nearby.

programme.title: A Body In The Basement
programme.desc: When friends find Brad McGarry shot dead in the basement of his Ohio home, evidence suggests a robbery but soon a more complicated motive emerges.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Survivi...

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Survivi...

programme.desc: Police watch the video of a woman closing up after her shift at a gas station. One moment, she is there and then she is gone, never to be seen again.

programme.desc: It's biscuit week for our 10 bakers with biscotti, jam drops and a tricky jigsaw made from biscuits on the menu.

programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.desc: Join Jacob for his unique and unmissable take on the day's news.

programme.desc: Morty, Jerry's father, comes to New York to see a back specialist and asks Jerry about the watch he gave him. At NBC, George tries negotiate their deal, but ends up doing more bad than good.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry has dinner with his parents and Uncle Leo. Elaine uses Kramer as her boyfriend in trying to fool her shrink and Jerry tries to buy back the watch.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine, Jerry, George and Susan go to a cabin owned by Susan's father. They all take a side trip with Jerry to visit a sick fan who is a "bubble boy" in order to avoid germs.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry says the wrong thing while starting to get intimate with one of Elaine's co-workers; Henry's incriminating letters are found in the cabin debris; Jerry and George start working on the pilot for the series they pitched to NBC.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer gets everyone tickets to the opera. But George scalps his tickets after Susan can't go. Elaine breaks up with "Crazy" Joe, and Jerry and Elaine go to the opera together, each not knowing the other's past with "Crazy" Joe.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George and Jerry continue working on their script and try to find a good idea to base the series off of. George considers dumping Susan so he can use his new profession to attract women.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After George is caught by his mother, the four main characters devise a contest to see who can go the longest without pleasuring him/herself.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When Jerry and Elaine are forced to take a standby flight, Jerry gets to party in first class with a model; George and Kramer go between JFK and La Guardia to pick them up; Kramer sees a man who owes him money at the airport.

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.desc: Jerry returns from a two-week tour and tries to help his old friend and new neighbour Babu, who has been arrested for overstaying his visa and is facing deportation. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George and Jerry struggle to keep their idea for a television show alive; George is caught staring at the cleavage of the daughter of the NBC executive who is approving their script; Jerry meets an old girlfriend he never could kiss.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: No thanks to Elaine, Jerry is forced to work hard to prove he is straight when a college reporter mistakenly reports that he and George are gay; Jerry starts dating the news reporter to prove that he really loves women.

programme.desc: Jerry, Elaine and George decide to volunteer to help elderly people; Elaine is repulsed by the goiter problems with her new patient; Kramer and Newman attempt to make money by selling old records to a used record store.

programme.desc: Jerry decides to dump his girlfriend after Elaine says her figure is the result of breast implants; Elaine accidently discovers that the breasts are real; George joins his girlfriend on a trip to Detroit for her aunt's funeral.

programme.desc: Elaine decides to visit her former boyfriend, who is in the hospital for a serious operation; Kramer and Jerry have an accident with a Junior Mint; Jerry has a date with a woman whose name rhymes with a female body part.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George panics when there is a false fire alarm at a kid's birthday party, abandoning the women and children in his attempted escape; Kramer starts dating a woman, who works with Elaine; Jerry gets revenge on a heckler.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: The gang makes a special trip to the Hamptons for a weekend to see a friend's new baby; George becomes upset when he discovers that his girlfriend enjoys topless sunbathing; Kramer steals lobsters and gets into trouble with the law.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's life turns completely around when he adopts a new opposite philosophy; Kramer appears on "Regis and Kathy Lee" to promote his new coffee table book; Jerry agrees when Rachael tells him that she wants to break up.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer chaperones Jerry's date with a Miss America hopeful.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George gets upset when his girlfriend is thanked for a dinner he bought; Jerry becomes obsessed when he finds that his current girlfriend once dated Newman; Elaine goes to a stationary store, where the clerk flirts with her.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer finds Jerry's old birthday checks from his grandmother and insists he deposits them, which puts Jerry's nana in unexpected debt; Elaine mistakes a high-talking man for a woman on the phone.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry feels misled when his mysterious Chinese date ends up not being Chinese; Elaine ruins her close friend's latest relationship with a man who likes to talk; George becomes miserable when his parents decide to separate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's new couch is completely ruined when Elaine upsets a man with a bladder condition; Kramer decides to start up his own new pizza business; George joins a book club, but instead of reading the books, he rents the movies.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's excitement about dating a Romanian Olympic gymnast suddenly diminishes after a bad intimate experience; George's girlfriend is shocked when she catches him eating out of the trash; Kramer passes a kidney stone.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry accepts an Armani suit from Kenny Bania, provided that he will treat him to a meal at Mandy's; Elaine dates a bouncer from England, who turns out to have a few secrets; Kramer decides to start a new diet of only fresh foods.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George decides to buy a convertible that a car salesman claims was once owned by Jon Voight; Kramer attempts to save a small shoe-repair business; Elaine wins Mr. Pitt tickets to the renowned Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George passes up hiring a beautiful secretary for an ordinary woman, in the hopes of less distraction; Jerry catches his dry cleaner wearing his clothes; Elaine buys an expensive dress at a store that uses flattering mirrors.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A grade school acquaintance puts pressure on Jerry to finally settle an old score in the form of a race; Elaine is blacklisted from a Chinese restaurant; George responses to a personal advertisement in a communist newspaper.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry attempts an impossible switch when he finds that he likes his girlfriend's roommate more than her; George is convinced that his new girlfriend is bulimic; Kramer decides to be himself and starts going by his first name.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine experience "re-gifting" and "de-gifting", George loves his girlfriend's apartment, while Kramer and Newman become engrossed in a game of Risk.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George meets an old friend who's spent the last few months undergoing chemotherapy that everyone knew except him while Kramer calls a litterbug a "pig" near a cop who's on a quest to catch a long-time parking ticket scofflaw.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry, Elaine, George and Kramer plan to go to the movies, but Jerry takes out some time to look back at nine years of memories.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine, George and Kramer attempt to rush Jerry in order to make it to the movie theater on time, while viewers are presented with clips of hysterical and touching moments from more than nine years of laughter-filled memories.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys

programme.title: Nomads Of The Serengeti
programme.desc: Head into the wildlife haven on the edge of the Serengeti. Formed out of a volcanic eruption, it's home to the highest concentration of mammals in the world.

programme.title: Wildest New Zealand
programme.desc: New Zealands isolated islands are famed as an unusual paradise, home to a variety of unique wildlife. Best known for its flightless birds, ancient reptiles and coastal mammals, a closer look reveals another world.

programme.title: Wildest New Zealand
programme.desc: At the water's edge, a brave group of male penguins gather to make a dangerous journey. The goal - to find a burrow before the females arrive.

programme.title: Wildest New Zealand
programme.desc: New Zealand's west coast is like nowhere else. From glacier-covered mountains and rain-drenched native forests to rough frigid seas, the landscape defies belief.

programme.title: Wildest New Zealand
programme.desc: In New Zealand, two wild fortresses protect the vulnerable native animals: One a remote island protected by a moat of saltwater, the other a hilltop citadel surrounded by a predator-proof barrier.

programme.title: Wildest New Zealand
programme.desc: In New Zealand, two wild fortresses protect the vulnerable native animals: One a remote island protected by a moat of saltwater, the other a hilltop citadel surrounded by a predator-proof barrier.

programme.title: Deadly By Nature
programme.desc: Engage in a game of cat and mouse with nature's top mimics and stealthy hunters.

programme.title: Deadly By Nature
programme.desc: Watch how trust turns some predators into collaborators and others into lunch.

programme.title: Africa's Claws & Jaws
programme.desc: Sharks are among the planet's oldest and most highly evolved predators. Along the coast of southern Africa, pioneers work to uncover their incredible secrets.

programme.title: Africa's Claws & Jaws
programme.desc: Lurking in the African shadows are reptiles we seldom see. Masters of the underworld, these snakes and lizards have conquered almost every habitat there.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The Belize Barrier Reef is part of the Mesoamerican Reef System, which stretches for approximately 700 miles from Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula to Honduras and Guatemala.

programme.title: Arabian Inferno
programme.desc: The bone dry deserts make the Arabian landscape almost inhospitable. But for three months of the year, rainfall turns a remote region into a lush paradise.

programme.title: Land Of Primates
programme.desc: Enter the wilds of South Africa to get an intimate look into one of the continents most misunderstood primates. Like humans, these primates have unique personalities and share strong bonds with their families and friends.

programme.title: Land Of Primates
programme.desc: As humans take up more space, the baboons of Africa must adapt. Travel across the continent to watch them form unbreakable social bonds, serve to protect their families and survive a changing landscape.

programme.title: Seasons Of The Wild
programme.desc: In Southern Florida, a unique and complex ecosystem known as the Everglades has entered its winter season. Predator and prey are forced to live in close proximity due to a limited supply of water.

programme.title: Seasons Of The Wild
programme.desc: Waters flood Southern Florida's mangroves and marshes. Many of the 600 animal species that live in the Everglades disperse during this time, expanding their hunting and breeding grounds.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Spoonbill Soft Shoe Shuffle: The team help a trio of troubled baby wallabies and a koala having seizures. Plus, a kookaburra has surgery and a spoonbill gets corrective shoes.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: The clinic deals with the aftermath of a Brisbane flood, while a baby kangaroo is in need of round-the-clock care. Vet Karina tackles the turtle waiting list.

programme.title: Attack And Defend
programme.desc: Every predator needs a speciality - and these tenacious insect-eaters have a great one. They evolved to hunt a virtually unlimited food source: bugs. With highly-developed hunting skills, they source, kill and consume with great success.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Vet Karina fights to save a koala mauled by dogs. Plus, rescue Chantel tries to pick up a peeved possum, while vet Meaghan bonds with a gaggle of goslings.

programme.title: CROCS OF KATUMA
programme.desc: Persevere with a mother crocodile as she struggles to survive and raise her young in one of Africas most seasonally volatile and unforgiving rivers, the Katuma. Endure hunger and danger as she guards her clutch with ruthless precision.

programme.title: The Big Dry

programme.title: NEWSROOM TOKYO
programme.desc: This program gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia. It explains the day's developments and what is behind them.

programme.title: Dive in Tokyo
programme.sub-title: Gotanda - An Eclectic Town of Hills and Valleys
programme.desc: Gotanda is a hilly district shaped by the Meguro River. It's home to high-end residential areas as well as low-lying areas with an industrial past. It also has a growing reputation as a startup hub.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.sub-title: Hamamatsu: Sunny City with Positive Spirit
programme.desc: Hamamatsu in Shizuoka Prefecture is a land blessed with a temperate climate all year round. It is one of the sunniest cities in Japan, boasting the most number of days with sunshine.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.sub-title: GLP-1 Drugs for Obeisity: Benefits and Risks
programme.desc: GLP-1 receptor agonists are becoming a game changer in the treatment of obesity. However, using them without medical supervision is risky. We report on the potential of GLP-1 treatment.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: The team explores a factory in Saitama making globes for educational use and much more besides. See the skill it takes to turn flat maps into spherical globes - and what in the world is an "AR globe"?

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: The world's thinnest washi (traditional paper) is just 0.03 mm thick but tough, and is used to restore cultural artifacts. See Tosa's natural landscape and washi artisans at work, in time-lapse.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: A retired kindergarten principal has a magical ability to understand her former students' needs. But illness is affecting her ability to speak. What lies ahead for her and those who seek her advice?

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Spring
programme.sub-title: Butterbur and Miso, a Detoxifying Delight
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to hair. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.sub-title: This Japanese omelet is sweet and delicious.
programme.desc: #26 This Japanese omelet is sweet and delicious. / Stack adjectives to get more ways to express your impressions. The key is changing the first "i" of "i"-ending adjectives to "kute."

programme.title: Culture Crossroads - BOSAI: Be Prepar...
programme.desc: Every summer, several typhoons approach Japan and make landfall. By understanding the way they move and the power of their rainstorms, we can learn how to protect ourselves and our possessions.

programme.title: HELLO!NHK WORLD JAPAN
programme.sub-title: Promoting NHK WORLD-JAPAN at Educational Institutions
programme.desc: At the University of Tokyo's Study Abroad Fair, NHK WORLD-JAPAN showed students how its content can be used to learn practical English, and introduced an educational program in Japanese schools.

programme.title: NEWSROOM TOKYO
programme.desc: This program gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia. It explains the day's developments and what is behind them.

programme.title: Direct Talk #256
programme.sub-title: Considering Our Future Through Dinosaur Research
programme.desc: In June 2025, Kobayashi Yoshitsugu published a trailblazing paper, illuminating the evolutionary process of large tyrannosaurs. He explains how such research helps us consider the future of humanity.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony
programme.desc: As spring arrives, Japan's oldest private herb garden in Uda, Nara Prefecture, bursts into life. This episode tells the story of the people who follow in the footsteps of their ancestors to preserve these herbs.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: We break down a print that warps space to allow the viewer to be in two places at once: Shinobazu Pond, known for its lotus flowers, and the Sumida River, one of Edo's busiest waterways.

programme.title: Ethical Every Day
programme.desc: Japanese firms are rethinking mass production and disposal. The world's third-largest clothing company is recycling and reusing used clothes. Plus, one firm is reducing e-waste and helping refugees.

programme.desc: Hamamatsu in Shizuoka Prefecture is a land blessed with a temperate climate all year round. It is one of the sunniest cities in Japan, boasting the most number of days with sunshine.

programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as EDO. More than a million people enjoyed life in this city, they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore the soul of old Tokyo.

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: On those hot, humid summer nights, nothing can get in the way of sleep like mosquitoes on the hunt. We learn about the tools the Edo townspeople had at their disposal to fight the pesky insects.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: BOSAI:Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: The hazard map for Mt. Fuji was revised in 2021, revealing the possibility of greater damage from lava flows. We'll look at what lies behind those assumptions and what countermeasures can be taken.

programme.title: DESIGN MUSEUM JAPAN
programme.desc: Sato Taku (Graphic designer) visits Miyazaki. The crowded signs of local bars inspire Sato to reconsider the conventions of modern design, and embrace the appeal of the unknown.

programme.title: KABUKI KOOL
programme.sub-title: The Revenge of the Soga Brothers
programme.desc: The popular, but true story of two brothers who avenged their father inspired a dazzling variety of so many kabuki plays and dances. that they formed a new genre. Actor Ainosuke explores further.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: NEO-JAPONISM
programme.desc: The Bon Odori dance, a Japanese summer tradition, has gone global. We look at events held in Malaysia and Brazil and explore the rhythms that bring people from diverse backgrounds together.

programme.title: A Culture Built with Wood
programme.desc: Kishu, in the southern part of the Kii Peninsula, is famous among chefs worldwide for its charcoal production. Join us as we examine what fuels the eco-friendly charcoal culture of Kishu.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo
programme.desc: The word yakumi refers to the use of traditional herbs and spices. Japanese food wouldn't be the same without favorites like wasabi or yuzu. See how these and more are influencing global food trends.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo mini
programme.desc: Delicious food from Tokyo's markets! Learn about the amazing ingredients that are sourced from across Japan and sold at Tokyo's fresh food markets.

programme.title: Hit the Road 5min
programme.desc: One of the most appealing features of Japan's national road network is the various Michinoeki, literally way stations, that provide a place for motorists to rest, dine and shop.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as EDO. More than a million people enjoyed life in this city, they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore the soul of old Tokyo.

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: On those hot, humid summer nights, nothing can get in the way of sleep like mosquitoes on the hunt. We learn about the tools the Edo townspeople had at their disposal to fight the pesky insects.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: A New Look at Shadows. Japanese have long found beauty in shadows, but new discoveries still astonish us in art and design. Discover how these designs can change how we see the world.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Rockie and Her ...
programme.desc: Puppet action show for children. In a distant post-human future where surviving creatures have formed a community, new-breed dinosaur girl Rockie sets out on hilarious adventures with her schoolmates.

programme.title: TAKE TECH
programme.desc: A program for upper primary to lower secondary school children to explore the everyday technologies all around them. Each episode takes a piece of familiar tech to find out what it does and how.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Putting Himself Into Every Grain: Seki Tomoharu, Rice Farmer
programme.desc: Seki Tomoharu once turned his back on farming; now he grows legendary rice that wins international awards. Why did he change? Amid rice shortages and global warming, he pursues his own green farming.

programme.title: RAMEN JAPAN 5min.
programme.desc: A gourmet tour of ramen all around Japan. This time: the birthplace of tonkotsu, Fukuoka. Looking at three different styles, we'll learn this ramen's secrets, and the story of its creation.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: A man stranded in the Arctic is finally about to receive his long awaited rescue. However, after a tragic accident, his opportunity is lost. He must decide whether to remain in the relative safety of his camp or to embark on a deadly trek.

programme.title: Abre Los Ojos
programme.desc: Cesar is a handsome playboy who has it all until he falls hard for the beautiful Sofia (Penelope Cruz) and a jealous ex involves him in a car accident that disfigures his face.

programme.title: Relaxer
programme.desc: With the impending Y2K apocalypse fast approaching, Abbie is faced with the ultimate challenge - the unbeatable level 256 on Pac-Man - and he can't get off the couch until he conquers it. A survival story set in a living room.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Re-Animator
programme.desc: An arrogant young scientist who is attending a medical school sets off a series of horrifying events when he develops a serum that gives life to dead flesh, and a fellow student and his girlfriend become involved in the plot.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: They're cute and cuddly by day, lethal demons by night. Toys come alive for just one purpose, death. And for five adults in a toy warehouse, every child's worst nightmare has become a reality.

programme.title: Doll Man Vs Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: After a man observes a strange occurrence in his backyard, he decides to investigate and in the process mistakenly enters a time machine which causes him to travel one hour into the past, causing unfortunate events to soon unfold.

programme.title: The Navigator: A Medieval Odyssey
programme.desc: A young 14th Century boy with acute psychic powers believes that he can rescue his fellow villagers by tunnelling their way through the earth. To their surprise they come out in New Zealand in 1988.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: Ten years after Willie Parker ratted on his old mobster friends in exchange for personal immunity, two hit men kidnap him and drive him to Paris for his planned execution. However, they encounter many mishaps along the way.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann is the slickest gangster in town and the leader of the gang of the same name. They have more bank robberies to their name than they can count. But his adversary, corrupt and ruthless cop Christini, is hell bent to capture him.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A young recruit for the IRA is assigned to watch a British soldier kidnapped in a plan to free an Irish rebel, and he ultimately forms a bond with the man and a relationship with his girlfriend, who the recruit promises to protect.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A young recruit for the IRA is assigned to watch a British soldier kidnapped in a plan to free an Irish rebel, and he ultimately forms a bond with the man and a relationship with his girlfriend, who the recruit promises to protect.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: A desperate ex-con decides to rob his wealthy employer's house in order to pay his wife's debt to a loan shark, but after he enters the family's home he discovers that it has become a deadly maze of traps set by a ruthless villain.

programme.title: Hell House LLC
programme.desc: Five years after an unexplained malfunction causes the death of 15 tour-goers and staff on the opening night of a Halloween haunted house tour, a documentary crew travels back to the scene of the tragedy to find out what really happened.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: The Science Of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.desc: Part 2. After achieving two search warrants, Kozenczak finds a large amount of incriminating evidence, and later 29 bodies buried throughout John Gacy's property.

programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behaviour after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.desc: Japanese teens investigate a series of suicides linked to an internet webcam that promises visitors the chance to interact with the dead.

programme.title: The Chaser

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.desc: Reports of ritual grave desecration and corpse theft draw five close friends into rural Texas to check on a grandfather's gravesite, and while on their way they pick up a crazed hitchhiker and encounter a family of murderous cannibals.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknownst to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them with a vengeance.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. But when the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship before hundreds of sailors die. And as Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines, Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After making a leap of faith, Claire washes up on a seemingly deserted island where survival is her only option.

programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica bringing Jamie and Claire that much closer to their goal. During a lavish ball on the island, the Frasers encounter old allies, as well as former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.desc: As Jamie continues to hunt Murtagh with the aid of the zealous Lieutenant Hamilton Knox, he's forced to consider whether or not he's on the right side of history.

programme.desc: Jamie and Claire help a bondservant rescue his twin brother from their abusive master, but discover that the situation is much more complicated than they had initially thought.

programme.desc: Claire struggles with her demons as a nefarious rumor begins to spread on the Ridge. Tensions rise as the residents fear there is a dangerous person in their midst.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Richard Brown and his Committee of Safety arrive to arrest Claire for murder. However, due to the rising political tensions in the colonies, Brown's plan to find a judge for a trial does not go as expected.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie races towards Wilmington to rescue Claire from the gallows, only to discover that the American Revolution has reached North Carolina.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire makes a startling discovery about Roger and Brianna's newborn daughter. A familiar face returns to the Ridge with explosive consequences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie discovers Arch Bug has been keeping a dangerous secret. In the 20th century, Roger and Brianna find a link to Jamie and Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: On the way to Scotland, Jamie is pulled back into the Revolutionary War. William is sent on a covert mission. Roger and Brianna struggle to adapt to life in the 1980s.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: At Ticonderoga, Jamie and Claire prepare for an imminent British assault. Roger compiles information about time travel while Brianna earns the respect of her coworkers.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire help civilians flee Ticonderoga after the fort falls into British hands. Roger discovers the identity of the mysterious "Nuckelavee".

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie prepares to face British forces in battle. Roger and Brianna question Buck MacKenzie's intentions in the 20th century. William fights in the First Battle of Saratoga.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie fights in the pivotal Second Battle of Saratoga. Roger and Brianna search for Jemmy.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie races towards Wilmington to rescue Claire from the gallows, only to discover that the American Revolution has reached North Carolina.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire makes a startling discovery about Roger and Brianna's newborn daughter. A familiar face returns to the Ridge with explosive consequences.

programme.desc: Luella and Frank are approached by a magician after a woman dies during his stage show when she gets chosen out of the audience to assist him with one of his magic tricks, and he needs their help to prove that his rival sabotaged the trick.
